productDisplayName: Nike Men  Court Majestic White Casual Shoe
description: Designed in a low profile silhouette for the ace tennis player, the nike Court Majestic lives true to its name and offers a majestic look with ample comfort. With cushioned comfort and a grippy outsole, this shoe also doubles up as a perfect casual sneaker. Upper Synthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on either side of the midfoot for style Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Cushioned tongue and collar for snug comfort Padded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protection Midsole Phylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with herringbone grooves for optimal traction Shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
